arts.ttl: Wolves 'united' behind manager O'Neil - chairman Shi
arts.sum: Wolves chairman Jeff Shi acknowledges results need to improve but says the club is "united" behind under-pressure manager Gary O'Neil.

arts.ttl: Wolves head coach Gary O'Neil publicly backed by chairman Jeff Shi in statement
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers head coach Gary O'Neil receives the public backing of chairman Jeff Shi despite the club's poor form in the Premier League.
